TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Dikidiki ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 110 buwan, 300 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 89 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 66%, Rukay 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dikidiki hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Dikidiki hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Dikidiki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dikidiki hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Dikidiki hya' ga Kalito'od. tay mkyahu' na Dikidiki hya' ga Pinaski. tay 'llaw na Dikidiki hya' ga Fudafudak. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *iki*iki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, rukaj *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa kalitoʔo*. taj mkjaħuʔ na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa pinas~ɕki. taj ʔllaw na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa *u*a*u*ak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Dikidiki ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 110 buwan, 300 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 211 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 89 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 66%, Rukay 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dikidiki hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Dikidiki hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Dikidiki hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dikidiki hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Dikidiki hya' ga Kalito'od. tay mkyahu' na Dikidiki hya' ga Pinaski. tay 'llaw na Dikidiki hya' ga Fudafudak. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *iki*iki ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, rukaj *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa kalitoʔo*. taj mkjaħuʔ na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa pinas~ɕki. taj ʔllaw na *iki*iki ħjaʔ ɣa *u*a*u*ak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
